mission: AX Mission Reachability Audit v0.1 — define methodology, audit 2 sites, synthesize findings
summary: Bootstrapped repo + acorn view. Drafted 5-phase reachability rubric (Discover/Resolve/Internalize/Complete/Verify, 0-3 each). Audited mczaykowski.com (site MRS 2.8) and stripe.com (site MRS 2.3 against synthetic mission set). Headline finding: two AX patterns exist (principal vs platform-docs) needing different rubrics; principal pattern is currently more mature; Verify is universally weakest phase; trust-packet adoption is the single highest-leverage change for platform-pattern sites. Synthesis in README.md. Codex independent audit + adversarial review pending in space ax-reachability.
decisions: Split AX surfaces into two patterns: principal (mczaykowski.com) vs platform-docs (Stripe/Linear/Anthropic-docs). Methodology must declare pattern before scoring.
Use a synthesized default mission set for sites that don't declare missions, but flag scores as not absolutely comparable across patterns.
Keep Internalize and Complete as distinct phases for v0.2 despite some co-variance; revisit after more audits.
open_threads: Codex independent audit of one peer site (Linear or platform.claude.com recommended)
Codex adversarial review of methodology + synthesis
Decide whether to prototype axmra CLI as follow-up
Open methodology question: registry of default mission sets per pattern?
Open methodology question: third pattern beyond principal/platform?
